rows.notes: Visual override for description. The 'S' in 'Soluta' is clear, as is 'varie.'. The punctuation is a period. Both extractors correctly identified the row type and absence of amounts. gemini-flash's description was closer.

rows.description: June 20. Bp. Trinnial. Visit. for Procoros. & Spindal. &
rows.notes: Amounts (0.9.8) are consistent across both extractors and visually confirmed with high clarity. Description adopted from gemini-flash, as it is a more accurate visual transcription, noting the slightly compressed 'Procoros. & Spindal. &'.
rows.english_description: Expenses for the bishop's triennial visitation, covering procurations and associated charges.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Expenses for the bishop's triennial visitation, covering procurations and associated charges, amounting to £0 9s 8d.

rows.notes: Amounts (1.13.9) are consistent across both extractors and visually confirmed with high clarity. Description adopted from gemini-flash, which correctly read the initial '38' and 'Bile'.
rows.english_description: Payment to Tearles (formerly a slater) for his bill, likely for roofing or slating work.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Tearles (formerly a slater) for his bill, amounting to £1 13s 9d.

rows.description: July 15. Three Poor Rates. to St. Michaell Parish Rect.
rows.notes: Visually confirmed description from gemini-flash. Pounds and shillings are clear. Pence is visually a '0'; gpt-5-mini's note identifies ambiguity but ultimately chooses '9', which is overridden by direct visual inspection.
rows.english_description: Payment of three poor rates to the rector of St Michael's parish.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of three poor rates to the rector of St Michael's parish, amounting to £1 3s 0d.

rows.description: 20 Merton & Ld. With. Dis. to Mr. Matel. due T.D. 1792. for which see Dis. Book. Pages 168 & 170. compared. with Coll. Legr. P. 199. This Letter there inserted. H. Richards
rows.notes: Description adopted from gemini-flash, which is a much more accurate visual transcription, including numbers and names ('Merton', 'Matel', '168 & 170'). Pounds and shillings are clear. Pence is visually a '1', overriding gpt-5-mini's '7'. The length and detail of the description presented challenges for both.
rows.english_description: Disbursement to Mr. Matel relating to matters concerning Merton and Lord With(??), referencing accounts due 1792 and related ledger entries (see dispute book); entry signed H. Richards.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Disbursement to Mr. Matel relating to matters concerning Merton and Lord With(??), referencing accounts due 1792 and related ledger entries, amounting to £9 8s 1d.

rows.description: 11 To Pascer in part of Accounal ~~~
rows.notes: Amounts (1.1.0) are consistent across both extractors and visually confirmed. Description adopted from gemini-flash, which is a more accurate visual transcription for the date '11' and the words 'Pascer' and 'Accounal'. gemini-flash's note correctly identifies the visual ambiguity in these words.
rows.english_description: Part payment to Pascer towards his account.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Part payment to Pascer towards his account, amounting to £1 1s 0d.

rows.description: 7 To Overseers for Gaol Tax as by Rec. & 3 poor Rates.
rows.notes: Amounts (1.14.6) are consistent across both extractors and visually confirmed. Description adopted from gemini-flash, which better transcribed 'Overseers' and 'Rec.', and correctly inferred 'Gaol Tax' despite visual ambiguity (which gemini-flash noted).
rows.english_description: Payment to the parish overseers for the gaol tax and three poor rates as per receipt.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the parish overseers for the gaol tax and three poor rates as per receipt, amounting to £1 14s 6d.

rows.description: To Mr. Caster. Bib. Lect. & per for a Mod. Library
rows.notes: Description adopted from gemini-flash, which is a more accurate visual transcription ('Caster', 'Mod. Library'). Pounds are clear. Shillings are visually a '5', overriding gpt-5-mini's '3'.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Caster for Bible lectures and for a modern library provision.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Caster for Bible lectures and for a modern library provision, amounting to £3 5s 0d.

rows.description: 11 To the same for D. Mitchell & Pension many ~~~
rows.notes: Amounts (3.3.0) are consistent across both extractors and visually confirmed. Description adopted from gemini-flash, which is a more accurate visual transcription for the date '11' and 'D. Mitchell & Pension many'. gpt-5-mini's leading 'M' is not for this line.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Caster on behalf of Dr Mitchell and for pension monies.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Caster on behalf of Dr Mitchell and for pension monies, amounting to £3 3s 0d.

rows.description: 16. To the same for two Bile Ropes. or by Rec.
rows.notes: Amounts (0.13.0) are consistent across both extractors and visually confirmed. Description adopted from gemini-flash, which accurately transcribed 'Bile Ropes. or by Rec.', and provided a good note about the visual vs. contextual reading of 'Bile/Bell'.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Caster for two bell ropes (as per receipt).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Caster for two bell ropes, amounting to £0 13s 0d.

rows.description: 19 Common Room Hires as per Bile.
rows.notes: Amounts (0.12.0) are consistent across both extractors and visually confirmed. Description adopted from gemini-flash, which accurately transcribed 'Room Hires' and 'Bile', supported by gemini-flash's note regarding 'Bile' likely being an abbreviation for 'Bill'.
rows.english_description: Payment for hires of the Common Room as stated on the bill.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for hires of the Common Room as stated on the bill, amounting to £0 12s 0d.

rows.description: 29 To Bolton for Plumbing & Glazing for 4. years.
rows.notes: Description and amounts adopted from gemini-flash, visually confirmed. Pounds are clearly '8', shillings '19', pence '3', and fraction '0.75'. gpt-5-mini misread pounds, shillings, and the number of years.
rows.english_description: Payment to Bolton for plumbing and glazing work covering four years.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Bolton for plumbing and glazing covering four years, amounting to £8 19s 3.75d.

rows.description: 1 To Mr. Reard for Carpenter work. D°
rows.notes: Description adopted from gemini-flash, which is visually more accurate. Pounds and shillings are clear. Pence is visually a '0'. There is no visible fraction mark, disproving gpt-5-mini's interpretation of '8' and '0.25'.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Reard for carpenter work.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Reard for carpenter work, amounting to £37 11s 0d.

rows.notes: Description adopted from gemini-flash, which is visually more accurate, including the name 'Townsend'. Pounds and shillings are clear. Pence is visually a '1', overriding gpt-5-mini's '7'.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Townsend for masonry work.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Townsend for masonry work, amounting to £19 13s 1d.

rows.notes: Total row visually confirmed. Pounds are clearly '89', shillings '5', and pence '5'. The description of '---' is visible above the total sum in the main description column. gpt-5-mini misread pounds ('59' instead of '89') and shillings ('6' instead of '5').
